core_invariant: If no valid topology object exists, reconciliation legitimacy is NULL.

drift_classes.meaning: A runtime route, handler, or execution-capable surface exists outside declared canonical topology.
Validated topology hash material differs from executed topology hash material.
A workflow, deploy, registry, or route surface gained undeclared mutation capability.
Governance artifacts or governance inventories diverge from runtime topology.
An observability-only route or surface becomes executable, deployment-capable, authority-creating, or mutation-capable.
The canonical execution boundary differs from the declared route and execution inventory.
Append-only registry lineage, reconciliation persistence, or schema lineage diverges or becomes mutable.
Recursive governance containment or sovereignty containment inventory diverges from canonical containment.
Declared canonical runtime routes differ from runtime route inventory.
A valid topology object cannot be identified or bounded traversal cannot establish exact topology evidence.
